heading: EARLY LITERACY INTERVENTION FOR CERTAIN STUDENTS
operative_text: If a student's results on two consecutive reading instruments administered under Section 28.0063 indicate that the student is at risk, as determined by the agency, of not achieving satisfactory performance in foundational literacy, a school district shall, as soon as practicable following the receipt of the student's results, provide reading interventions to the student.

defined_terms.definition_excerpt: at risk, as determined by the agency, of not achieving satisfactory performance in foundational literacy

_note: Section added by Acts 2025, 89th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1065 (H.B. 2), Sec. 5.10, eff. June 20, 2025. Compliance not required until commissioner adopts instrument list and designates first school year; Subsection (m) expires September 1, 2029.
